NIGERIA — OPEN TO REMOTE, FREELANCE & STARTUP WORK

I build digital products that settle like transactions — clean, verified, done.

Software engineer, AI solutions developer, and product designer. I help startups and businesses turn ideas into scalable software — and I'm building Neema, a fintech platform for digital asset transactions across Africa.

View my work Let's work together
About

Hi, I'm Joseph.

6Years Building
4Disciplines
3Years Leading Neema
2Certifications

I'm a software engineer and digital product builder. My work spans websites, product design, AI-powered tools, and fintech platforms — but the common thread is the same: understanding a real problem before writing a line of code.

What excites me isn't the code itself — it's what the code makes possible for the people using it. Every product I build starts with a person trying to get something done, and my job is to make that faster, clearer, and more trustworthy.

Right now I'm building Neema, a fintech platform focused on simplifying cryptocurrency and digital asset transactions across Africa — designed to earn trust before it scales.

Use technology to create opportunities for businesses and people across Africa and beyond.
QUICK FACTS● UP TO DATE

● FEATURED PROJECT — FOUNDER, PRODUCT STRATEGIST, DESIGNER

Neema

A fintech platform built for the Nigerian market, bringing a stock-trading experience — the clarity of a Bamboo — together with the speed and interface conventions of a crypto exchange: live order books, fast execution, and clean charting, alongside secure crypto wallet and digital-asset tools. The goal is straightforward but not easy: make investing and digital transactions accessible to everyone, and build the trust to earn that access before scaling.

MARKET — NIGERIA MODEL — BROKER-AS-A-SERVICE STAGE — MVP SCOPED
Planned Features
  • Live order book & fast execution
  • Secure crypto wallet
  • Peer-to-peer trading
  • Gift card marketplace
  • Virtual payment cards
  • Escrow transactions
  • Clean, real-time charting
  • User (KYC) verification
Core Principles
  • Build trust before scale
  • Simplicity over complexity
  • Community before funding
  • Radical transparency
  • User experience first
  • Build for Africa
Foundation Already Built
  • Broker-as-a-service model defined
  • Regulatory pathway mapped — securities brokerage vs. VASP licensing
  • Full system architecture designed
  • Order lifecycle & data model (ERD) built
  • MVP scope defined
  • Revenue model drafted
Projects

Selected work.

AI · E-commerce

AI Customer Support Chatbot

Built a GPT-powered chatbot for an e-commerce brand, automating responses to over 80% of common queries and cutting support ticket volume. Integrated with the client's existing CRM via REST APIs.

Node.jsOpenAI APIReact
SaaS · B2B

SaaS Dashboard & Design System

Designed and built a full analytics dashboard for a B2B SaaS client — a scalable design system in Figma, implemented pixel-perfect in Next.js and TypeScript, with data clarity and accessibility as the priority.

Next.jsTypeScriptFigma
Brand · Startup

Brand Identity & Webflow Site

Executed a complete brand identity for an African tech startup — logo, color system, typography, iconography — then translated it into a high-conversion marketing site in Webflow with custom interactions.

BrandingWebflowIdentity Systems
AI · Automation

Automation Workflow System

Architected an AI-driven content automation pipeline for a digital media company — generation, review, and scheduling in one flow, lifting output to 5x previous capacity.

OpenAI APINode.jsPrompt Engineering

What sets Joseph apart

I don't just build websites.

I build digital experiences that help businesses grow — with long-term scalability in mind from day one, not just getting it finished.

Full Product Ownership

Entire products end-to-end — brand identity and UX wireframes through to production-grade code and AI integration.

Founder-Level Thinking

Having built Neema from the ground up, every project gets the urgency and accountability of a founder, not just a contractor.

AI-Native Practitioner

Prompt engineering, OpenAI API experience, and an automation mindset — AI as a practical tool, not a feature bolted on.

African Market Context

Rare insight into building for African users — connectivity, payment infrastructure, trust, and localization.

Career Timeline

Founder & CEO — Neema · 2023–Present

Founded and lead Neema, a fintech startup simplifying crypto and digital asset transactions across Africa — product strategy, full-stack engineering, brand identity, and business development.

AI Solutions Developer — Freelance · 2022–Present

Design and deploy custom AI solutions — OpenAI-powered chatbots, automated content pipelines, and workflow tools — for clients across e-commerce, SaaS, and professional services.

Product Designer — Freelance · 2021–Present

End-to-end UI/UX design and branding — user research, information architecture, prototyping in Figma, and design systems for startups and SMEs.

Freelance Software Engineer · 2020–Present

Responsive websites and web applications across React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Node.js — performance-optimized, accessible, scalable front-ends.
